title: CurseApple
description: a mod adding cursed fruit to the game
body:
Mod Adds a New Structure and an Apple


Curse Apple: When eaten, the apple gives a curse effect
Curse Effect: Gives a random effect approximately every 18 seconds

     Curse Effect Effect :

         1.Summons zombie
          2.Slownes
           3. damage
            4.can Delete Items From Your Inventory
             5. can teleport you to Nether 
               6.removes Xp
           

     Curse Effect is random


This Mod Was Created For Hallowen
